Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ferlin P. Ruiz, Esq. of TUCKER ELLIS & WEST (415-617-2222), appearing for defendant / moving party Carrier Corporation
Richard A. Brody, Esq.of BRENT COON & ASSOCIATES (415-489-7420), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Beulah Mae Sigsbey, et al.

RULING:
Defendant Carrier Corporation's demurrer to all claims alleged against. Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiffs' failure to allege a specific product attributable to defendant renders the complaint deficient under Bockrath. For guidance of the parties in the future but without making a ruling on these issues, the fifth cause of action does not appear to be sufficient to withstand a pleading challenge, while the other causes of action challenged by defendant appear to be sufficient if the Bockrath issue is resolved. An order included ruling on defendant's motion to strike was signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
